criteria.description: EXPECTED_MISSING entry for /api/sensors/history removed; LEGACY_ROUTES entry for /api/sensors/readings removed.
criteria.evidence: contract_status.json diff: -2 lines (exactly the two entries named). Full invariants suite on main after cherry-pick: 96 passed.

4 new tests in the file covering: unauth → 401 JSON; happy-path with valid range+metric returns bucketed points matching the contract shape; invalid range or invalid metric returns 4xx error JSON; legacy /api/sensors/readings route is gone (404). Replaces the retired test_sensors_api.py which covered the old readings route. Main-branch run after cherry-pick: 131 total web+invariant tests pass.

notes: Evaluator run skipped (context budget). Third consecutive clean BE run under the manual-worktree + 7-step-wrap-up pattern. Pre-commit invariant carve-out for contract_status.json held. No surprises.
